serviceNotes.engine oil: S58 M engine: M service plans use shorter oil intervals than standard 4 Series (commonly 15,000 km / 12 months EU). Track use warrants 10,000 km changes.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Cabin filter per M maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; track use may require more frequent bleeding.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: High-output intake path; replace per CBS / inspection (~60,000 km planning).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: High-output turbo I6: plugs typically earlier than non-M DI engines (~60,000 km). Confirm M supplement.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Inspect at least every 20,000 km or before track days.
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: Inspect every 20,000 km or with front service.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: M-specific inspection intervals are shorter than standard G22.
serviceNotes.ZF8 gearbox fluid: M Steptronic (8-speed torque-converter): preventive fluid ~60,000 km is prudent despite lifetime-fill claims.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: Six-speed manual: gear oil ~60,000 km under M use.
serviceNotes.xDrive transfer case fluid: M4 xDrive / Competition xDrive only (not RWD manual or base RWD).
serviceNotes.differential fluids: M xDrive and rear LSD: fresh fluid ~60,000 km is a common M specialist recommendation.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: High thermal load turbo engine; preventive coolant service ~100,000 km.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: S58 DI: intake valve deposits; inspect/clean from ~80,000 km if rough idle or power loss.
